title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXXV. Natural History. [Bird boy's song.]
content:
Eat, Birds, eat, and make no waste,
        I lie here and make no haste;
        If my master chance to come,
        You must fly, and I must run.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DXXXV. Natural History. [Bird boy's song.]"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
